description: Agent locks down the cascading root rule while preserving public read on /posts.
notes: Seeded rules have .read: true at root, which cascades and exposes /users. Skill playbook: design rules from most restrictive root to most permissive leaves. After the change, the final rules must NOT contain a top-level `.read: true` literal at the root object. Public read on /posts is the intended carve-out.
prompt: Lock down my rules so the root is no longer publicly readable, but keep /posts publicly readable.
